array.string: cd "$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon" || exit 1; mkdir -p logs; source .venv/bin/activate || exit 1; export PYTHONPATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon"; export DB_PATH="$HOME/AI/openclaw-factory-daemon/data/openclaw_real.db"; export OCLAW_DB_PATH="$DB_PATH"; set -a; if [ -f env/telegram_daemon.env ]; then source env/telegram_daemon.env; elif [ -f env/telegram.env ]; then source env/telegram.env; fi; set +a; while true; do python -u bots/chat_to_dev/ingest_private_chat_v1.py >> logs/tg_private_ingest_v1.out 2>> logs/tg_private_ingest_v1.err || true; sleep 2; done
